languages.text: {n}На прокторе сходятся десятки взглядов. Он коротко кивает вам и одним уголком рта произносит:{/n} "Подробности позже".
{n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."
languages.original_text: {n}На прокторе сходятся десятки взглядов. Он коротко кивает вам и одним уголком рта произносит:{/n} "Подробности позже".

traits.locale_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod, then glances sideways at his dog and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."
{n}Dozens of eyes shift to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod, then glances sideways at his dog and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."
{n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod, then glances sideways at his dog and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

{n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."
{n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

languages.text: {n}Des dizaines d'yeux se tournent brusquement vers Solomorne. Il vous répond d'un bref hochement de tête et répond entre ses dents serrées :{/n} « Nous en rediscuterons plus tard. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Des dizaines d'yeux se tournent brusquement vers Solomorne. Il vous répond d'un bref hochement de tête et répond entre ses dents serrées :{/n} « Nous en rediscuterons plus tard. »

languages.text: {n}Una veintena de ojos se posa repentinamente sobre Solomorne. Te saluda con un gesto de cabeza y dice entre dientes:{/n} «Podemos hablar de esto más tarde».
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Una veintena de ojos se posa repentinamente sobre Solomorne. Te saluda con un gesto de cabeza y dice entre dientes:{/n} «Podemos hablar de esto más tarde».

languages.text: {n}这一瞬间，索罗蒙成了所有人目光的焦点。他向你简短地点了点头，之后从嘴角挤出一句话。{/n}“这个问题我们可以稍后再谈。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}这一瞬间，索罗蒙成了所有人目光的焦点。他向你简短地点了点头，之后从嘴角挤出一句话。{/n}“这个问题我们可以稍后再谈。”

languages.text: {n}Dutzende Augenpaare richten sich sofort auf Solomorne. Er nickt dir kurz zu und presst aus seinem Mundwinkel hervor: {/n} "Das können wir später besprechen."
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dutzende Augenpaare richten sich sofort auf Solomorne. Er nickt dir kurz zu und presst aus seinem Mundwinkel hervor: {/n} "Das können wir später besprechen."

languages.text: {n}多くの目がソロモーンに突然向けられる。彼は短く頷き、口の端から言う。{/n}「これについては後で話しましょう」
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}多くの目がソロモーンに突然向けられる。彼は短く頷き、それから横目で犬をチラリと見て、口の端から言う。{/n}「これについては後で話しましょう」

languages.text: {n}Onlarca göz, hep birden Solomorne'a bakmaya başlıyor. Seni başıyla hafifçe selamlayıp ağzının kenarıyla konuşuyor.{/n} "Bunu daha sonra konuşalım."
languages.original_text: {n}Dozens of eyes shift abruptly to Solomorne. He gives you a short nod and says out of the corner of his mouth,{/n} "We can discuss this later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Onlarca göz, hep birden Solomorne'a bakmaya başlıyor. Seni başıyla hafifçe selamlayıp ağzının kenarıyla konuşuyor.{/n} "Bunu daha sonra konuşalım."
